tldr: Vingegaard took the mountain finish at Uchon after attacking at 1 km to go, 42 seconds clear of Daniel Martínez and putting the GC question on early terms. Atrocious weather, a mass crash, and Juan Ayuso's race-ending injury made it the spring's most chaotic GC stage to date.

narrative.headline: Vingegaard's first stab; Ayuso's race ends
narrative.body: 195 km from Bourges to the Uchon mountain finish in atrocious weather. Vingegaard attacked at 1 km to go and rode away for the stage. A mass crash earlier in the stage ended Juan Ayuso's race; the UAE Tour podium man abandoned injured.

gcImpact.headline: Vingegaard into yellow
gcImpact.body: First major GC selection. Vingegaard takes the leader's jersey and the GC question is now everyone's response to him.

riderPerformances.name: Juan Ayuso
riderPerformances.narrative: Crashed in the day's mass-crash, abandoned injured. UAE's GC card for the week now void; the spring's first major GC casualty.

crashes.description: Mass crash earlier in the stage in atrocious weather
